<?php /** * Mockery (https://docs.mockery.io/) * * @copyright https://github.com/mockery/mockery/blob/HEAD/COPYRIGHT.md * @license https://github.com/mockery/mockery/blob/HEAD/LICENSE BSD 3-Clause License * @link https://github.com/mockery/mockery for the canonical source repository */ namespace Mockery\Loader; use Mockery\Generator\MockDefinition; use function class_exists; class EvalLoader implements Loader { /** * Load the given mock definition * * @return void */ public function load(MockDefinition $definition) { if (class_exists($definition->getClassName(), false)) { return; } eval('?>' . $definition->getCode()); } }
